creator: antonfb@hesiod.org
text:
It seems that we fetch the openjdk code from a forked repository owned by 'battleblow' and that fork is ifndef'ing the code to disable clearing V6ONLY on BSD systems. The original openjdk repos do not have this.
The repo seems to be a general porting effort and maybe this change is needed for some of the other BSD variants.
But this change seems to be a bad idea for FreeBSD.
Seems like it's been around for awhile, 2021 at least.
